# Package.Dependency.Trait.Condition

**Structure**

A condition that limits the application of a dependencies trait.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Condition
```

## Type Methods

- **when(traits:)**: Creates a package dependency trait condition.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
